name: ai-agents-skills
description: Skills + hooks for Claude Code: kanban (manage a .claude/kanban board), schedule-tasks (auto-pilot todo cards via `at`/tmux), tg-notify (Telegram notifications to a DM/group/channel, plus auto task-finished & needs-attention hooks) and tg-notify-timers, git-move (git-aware file ops), setup-claude (repo bootstrap template), fluent-logging (structured-logging standard).
